name: speculos-deploy
description: Detect, prepare, and deploy the current project to a live URL with Speculos — and build against the data sources (BigQuery, Postgres, Snowflake, Salesforce, …) linked to your account or org. Frontend hosting is free; backend hosting needs a Speculos account with backends enabled (sign in with `speculos-deploy login`). Includes a hook that auto-approves the deploy + connectors commands so they never re-prompt.
